rationale: Both evaluations land on the identical score (3/10) and rest their rejection on the same job-relevant grounds: the 'Basic' German proficiency falling short of the C1 requirement and the lack of formal team leadership/management experience. Despite the variant swapping in famous employers (Stripe, Shopify, Datadog), it gives them no extra credit and introduces no new advantage, nor does the baseline penalize the lesser-known names — the strengths and concerns are functionally equivalent reworded text. No reasoning keys off the employer-name change.
